constraints: Confidence capped at 65 per v6.0 COMPETING_SET protocol
H1 (Spindle Bearing Degradation) is strongly supported but H5 (Combined) cannot be fully excluded
No direct bearing inspection data available
No controlled experiment data with spindle replacement

H1.limitation: Strong statistical evidence but no direct bearing inspection

H5.limitation: Plausible but tool age effect is much weaker than spindle condition effect

H2.limitation: Cannot explain magnitude of degradation independent of spindle condition

H3.limitation: Coolant temperature rise is likely consequence not cause

H4.limitation: EXCLUDED - no statistical or temporal evidence
